things.name: Mount Bromo Sunrise
things.description: Pre-dawn jeep ride to the sea of sand and smoking crater - Java's most iconic view

things.name: Arab Quarter (Ampel District)
things.description: Historic Islamic trading quarter with the tomb of Sunan Ampel - Java's Wali Songo

things.name: House of Sampoerna Tobacco Museum
things.description: Dutch Art Nouveau building with the history of Sampoerna kretek clove cigarettes

things.name: Chinatown (Kembang Jepun)
things.description: Chinese New Year celebrations and traditional shops in Surabaya's flower street

things.name: Submarine Monument (KRI Pasopati 410)
things.description: Cold War-era Indonesian submarine moored as a museum

things.name: Heroes Monument (Tugu Pahlawan)
things.description: 100m independence monument commemorating the Battle of Surabaya on 10 November 1945

things.name: Ijen Crater Blue Fire
things.description: Night hike to the world's largest acid lake and eerie blue sulphuric flames

things.name: Kalimas Old Harbour
things.description: Traditional wooden Phinisi schooners from Sulawesi moored at the old harbour

things.name: Rawon (Black Beef Soup)
things.description: Surabaya's black keluak-nut beef soup - one of Indonesia's greatest dishes
